benefits.description: Knee felt insanely better within days of switching from subQ to IM injection
Significant healing improvement noticed after switching to IM administration compared to 2 months of subQ with barely any effect

protocol_notes: Used to pin 6 times a day with different peptides. Tried BPC subQ for ~2 months with minimal results. Switched to IM (ventro glute with 1.5 inch 23G needle) and noticed significant improvement in knee within days. Also pinned IM in quad but notes it is a scary location. Recommends glute and delt for IM injections.
